text/brand.description: Branded text accent — themed callouts, signatures. Use sparingly.

action/primary/rest.description: Primary action — rest. Highest-emphasis button. Pair with text.on-primary.

action/disabled.description: Disabled background applied to any action regardless of intent.

focus/indicator.description: Focus colour (yellow). Used for background fills and outer focus ring.

action/finish/rest.description: Finish action background — rest state. Domain-specific button role for completing a transaction or journey end-state. Distinct from feedback.success even though both share the same green hex; finish is an interactive action, success is a status indicator. Pair label colour with text.on-finish.

action/finish/hover.description: Finish action background — hover state. Pointer-over treatment for action.finish.rest.

action/finish/pressed.description: Finish action background — pressed state. Active/clicked treatment for action.finish.rest.

typography/link.description: Type composition for link text. textDecoration applied at component level via link.underline.* tokens.

elevation/compact/rest.description: Compact raised surface at rest — cards, dropdowns, popovers.

State.description: Interaction state — managed automatically by CSS and the browser. Not a React prop.

summary.variants: State: Default | Hover | Pressed | Visited | Disabled
summary.when: Use to trigger an action or navigation. State behaviour — On hover: background-color → #eaeffc; On press: background-color → #2b60de.

Type.description: Visual type — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

summary.slots: left-icon (icon, optional), arrow-left (icon, optional), title (text, optional), right-icon (icon, optional), cart (icon, optional)

Size.description: Visual size — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

intent.description: Visual intent — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

iconPosition.description: Controls icon position composition — affects which elements render and their arrangement.

state.description: Interaction state — managed automatically by CSS and the browser. Not a React prop.

size.description: Visual size — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

summary.variants: intent: primary | secondary | tertiary | success; iconPosition: none | leading | only | trailing; state: default | hover | pressed | disabled | focused; size: medium
summary.when: Use to trigger an action or navigation. State behaviour — On hover: background-color → var(--action-primary-hover), box-shadow → var(--elevation-compact-interactive); On press: background-color → var(--action-primary-pressed); On focus: padding → 0px, background-color → var(--focus-indicator), border → 4px solid #ffd801, box-shadow → var(--elevation-compact-interactive).

Size.description: Visual size — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.
Visual size — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.
